query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `reports` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `keywords` text NOT NULL,
  `keywordMode` enum('AND','OR') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OR',
  `startDate` varchar(32),
  `endDate` varchar(32),
  `kolIds` text,
  `languages` text,
  `regions` text,
  `folderIds` text,
  `resultCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `report_results` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `reportId` int NOT NULL,
  `tweetId` varchar(64),
  `authorHandle` varchar(128),
  `authorName` varchar(256),
  `kolId` int,
  `content` text,
  `postedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `language` varchar(16),
  `url` varchar(512),
  `likes` int DEFAULT 0,
  `retweets` int DEFAULT 0,
  `replies` int DEFAULT 0,
  `quotes` int DEFAULT 0,
  `impressions` bigint,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_report_results_reportId` (`reportId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `reports` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `keywords` text NOT NULL,
  `keywordMode` enum('AND','OR') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OR',
  `startDate` varchar(32),
  `endDate` varchar(32),
  `kolIds` text,
  `languages` text,
  `regions` text,
  `folderIds` text,
  `resultCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `report_results` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `reportId` int NOT NULL,
  `tweetId` varchar(64),
  `authorHandle` varchar(128),
  `authorName` varchar(256),
  `kolId` int,
  `content` text,
  `postedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `language` varchar(16),
  `url` varchar(512),
  `likes` int DEFAULT 0,
  `retweets` int DEFAULT 0,
  `replies` int DEFAULT 0,
  `quotes` int DEFAULT 0,
  `impressions` bigint,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_report_results_reportId` (`reportId`)
);
